x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Control test results (sn_audit_control_test) provide the historical compliance evidence Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted audit preparation and gap analysis. Sufficient test volume and completion rate are prerequisites for meaningful AI audit insights.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Perform control testing via Audit Management. Target: 50+ control tests in the trailing 12 months with 70%+ completion rate. Now Assist GRC uses recent test history for AI audit preparation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cec
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Control test results (sn_audit_control_test) provide the historical compliance evidence Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted audit preparation and gap analysis. Sufficient test volume and completion rate are prerequisites for meaningful AI audit insights.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Control Test Results</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    if (!gs.tableExists('sn_audit_control_test')) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'sn_audit_control_test not found', finding: 'Audit Management is not installed. Control test result check is not applicable.' };
    }
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_audit_control_test');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: 'No control tests in last 12 months', finding: 'No control tests found in the last 12 months. Now Assist GRC AI audit preparation requires recent control test history.' };
    }
    var gaPass = new GlideAggregate('sn_audit_control_test');
    gaPass.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaPass.addQuery('state', 'complete');
    gaPass.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaPass.query();
    var passed = gaPass.next() ? parseInt(gaPass.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    var pct = Math.round((passed / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = total + ' control tests (last 12 months) | ' + pct + '% complete';
    if (total >= 50 && pct >= 70) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: total + ' control tests with ' + pct + '% completion. Now Assist GRC has sufficient test history for AI-powered audit preparation.' };
    } else if (total >= 20 || pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue, finding: total + ' control tests with ' + pct + '% completion (targets: 50+, 70%+). Now Assist GRC audit preparation will have reduced coverage.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'Insufficient control test coverage (' + total + ' tests, ' + pct + '% complete). Now Assist GRC AI audit preparation requires comprehensive recent test history.' };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>GRC</module><number>CHK0000459</number><order>50</order><remediation_guidance>Perform control testing via Audit Management. Target: 50+ control tests in the trailing 12 months with 70%+ completion rate. Now Assist GRC uses recent test history for AI audit preparation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>03f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cec</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Control Test Results</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cec</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
